config.name: MyLÚA Enterprise Demo — 4 Scenes
config.target_audience_type: Healthcare systems, health plans, maternal care programs
config.audience_description: Enterprise decision-makers evaluating maternal health and care-between-visits solutions. Demo should feel premium, documentary-style, and product-accurate with no UI drift or sci-fi aesthetics.
config.visual_mode: Cinematic healthcare documentary with locked-off UI shots

persona.name: Enterprise Healthcare Documentary
persona.description: Premium healthcare film style. Documentary realism, stabilized motion, UI-preserving camera. No tilt, no push-in on UI shots; micro-environment motion only where screens must stay readable.
persona.lighting_style: Natural daylight, soft golden morning; no dramatic storm or neon
persona.rhythm: Calm, observational; locked-off on dashboard and phone shots
persona.framing_rules: Balanced composition; hospital slightly off-center in opener; monitors and phones centered and stable
persona.color_behavior: Warm natural grading, maternal wellness tones; no neon, no sci-fi

scenes.title: Enterprise Opening Context
scenes.purpose: Establish setting: mid-sized American city at sunrise with hospital campus visible; hopeful, calm, documentary healthcare tone.
scenes.nano_prompt: cinematic aerial establishing shot of a mid-sized American city at sunrise transitioning toward a hospital campus surrounded by quiet residential neighborhoods, hospital buildings visible but not dominating the skyline, soft golden morning light illuminating rooftops and tree-lined streets, gentle atmospheric haze in the distance, calm early-morning environment with minimal traffic, warm natural color grading, documentary healthcare film realism, subtle cinematic depth of field, balanced composition with the hospital slightly off-center, premium healthcare documentary aesthetic, realistic architecture and urban layout
scenes.veo_prompt: Framing begins as a wide aerial view of a quiet mid-sized American city at sunrise with the hospital campus visible slightly off-center among residential neighborhoods. The camera performs a slow stabilized forward glide as morning light illuminates rooftops and tree-lined streets. Light haze rests in the distance while long soft shadows stretch across the neighborhood. Movement remains smooth and observational, maintaining a calm early-morning atmosphere. Constraints: slow forward glide only, no tilting or rotation, stabilized drone motion, natural documentary pacing, 4-5 seconds.
scenes.comment: Negative: no futuristic skyline, no sci-fi buildings, no megacity density, no disaster atmosphere, no dramatic storm lighting, no dark dystopian mood, no overly saturated colors, no tilt-shift miniature effect

scenes.title: Population Analytics (Enterprise Insight)
scenes.purpose: Show maternal health analytics dashboard on desktop monitor; dashboard must remain fully readable—locked-off camera.
scenes.nano_prompt: modern healthcare analytics dashboard displayed on a large desktop monitor in a bright professional office, monitor centered on a clean minimal desk, dashboard interface clearly visible showing maternal health program insights including emotional wellbeing trends, breastfeeding support needs, transportation barriers, and member engagement metrics, structured dashboard layout with simple line charts, bar charts, and summary cards, clean healthcare UI with soft neutral colors and accessible typography, natural daylight streaming through office windows creating soft reflections on the monitor bezel, minimal modern workspace environment, realistic product-demo composition, cinematic documentary lighting, premium healthcare technology film style
scenes.veo_prompt: Framing shows a large desktop monitor centered on a clean desk displaying a maternal health analytics dashboard with line charts, bar charts, and summary metric cards. The camera remains locked off to preserve full UI readability. Subtle natural daylight shifts across the office while faint reflections move slightly across the monitor glass. Background office elements remain still, maintaining a quiet professional workspace atmosphere. Constraints: locked-off camera, UI fully visible and readable at all times, no zoom, no push-in, no tilt, no UI animation.
scenes.comment: Negative: no holographic interface, no floating UI elements, no cyberpunk dashboards, no neon colors, no financial trading charts, no cluttered analytics screens, no distorted or warped UI, no illegible charts

scenes.title: White Label Platform
scenes.purpose: Three phones in a row, same app UI with different branding (hospital system, health plan, maternal program); sales-critical shot, locked-off camera.
scenes.nano_prompt: three modern smartphones standing upright in a straight row on a clean neutral desk surface, evenly spaced and perfectly aligned, each phone displaying the same maternal health mobile app interface with identical layout but different branding themes and logos, representing a hospital system, a health plan, and a maternal care program, UI layout consistent across all devices including navigation bar, content cards, and maternal wellness resources, subtle branding color differences only, soft natural daylight entering from a nearby window creating gentle reflections on the phone glass, minimal modern workspace environment, cinematic product-demo lighting, high-end healthcare technology film style
scenes.veo_prompt: Framing shows three smartphones standing upright in a straight row on a clean desk, evenly spaced and aligned, each displaying the same maternal health app interface with different branding themes. The camera remains locked off to preserve the clarity of each phone screen. Soft daylight subtly shifts across the glass surfaces while the devices remain perfectly still. The environment stays quiet and minimal, maintaining a premium healthcare product demonstration tone. Constraints: locked camera, all three screens fully visible, no camera slide, no rotation, no focus shift, no UI movement or change.
scenes.comment: Order left to right: Hospital system, Health plan, Maternal program. Negative: no floating phones, no angled or tilted devices, no mismatched UI layouts, no distorted screens, no cluttered desk, no advertising style graphics, no neon colors

scenes.title: Final Brand Close
scenes.purpose: Minimal brand closing frame: soft maternal wellness gradient, lotus emblem centered with subtle bloom; calm premium healthcare close.
scenes.nano_prompt: minimal cinematic brand closing frame with a soft warm gradient background inspired by maternal wellness tones such as gentle peach, warm cream, and muted rose, elegant lotus emblem centered precisely in the frame, subtle soft light bloom radiating behind the emblem, clean empty space reserved for brand name typography below the logo, calm premium healthcare brand aesthetic, soft vignette at the edges, modern minimal design, cinematic product film closing frame
scenes.veo_prompt: Framing shows a minimal gradient background filling the frame in soft maternal wellness tones. The lotus emblem fades in gently at the center while a subtle light bloom forms behind it. The background gradient drifts very slowly while the emblem remains perfectly centered and still. Constraints: gentle gradient movement only, smooth logo fade-in, no camera movement, no lens flare, 3-4 seconds.
scenes.comment: Negative: no neon gradients, no heavy glow effects, no sci-fi lighting, no lens flare bursts, no cluttered text elements, no busy patterns

project_notes: Enterprise demo — 4 scenes. Prompts from NanoBanana and Veo optimized RTFs. Scene 1: aerial sunrise + hospital (slow forward glide, 4-5s). Scenes 2 and 3: locked-off camera to preserve UI readability (analytics dashboard, white-label phones). Scene 4: brand close with gradient and lotus emblem (3-4s). Negative prompts and motion constraints stored in scene comments.
